name: Childersburg
description: Childersburg is a place to play pickleball in Childersburg, AL. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Lincoln Recreation Center
description: Lincoln Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Lincoln, AL. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Spring Street Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Spring Street Recreation Center in Talladega, AL! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, food, and locker rooms.

name: Sylacauga City
description: Sylacauga City is a place to play pickleball in Sylacauga, AL. There are 4 outdoor clay courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.
